overall.description: A first-person vehicle drive through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along multi-lane roads past massive industrial structures, static tanker trains, and under heavy infrastructure, eventually turning at an intersection and entering a covered underpass while following a blue truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial thoroughfare with tanker storage lines

events.description: dark sedan passes by in the opposite direction on the left
approaching distant vehicles visible ahead on the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the industrial road, passing rows of parked tanker cars on the right side

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving in the opposite direction, passing the camera vehicle

entered.detail: row of large cylindrical industrial tanker cars on railway siding
low concrete divider separating the road from the tanker storage area
tall white industrial smokestacks rising behind factory buildings
tall palm trees lining the left side of the industrial street
network of large industrial pipes and conduits spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial road with the camera driving forward. Large tanker cars line the right side behind a concrete barrier, while palm trees and industrial chimneys are visible on the left. The camera passes a dark sedan driving in the opposite direction as it moves toward distant traffic under a hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial complex facade with steam vents

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive industrial building facade emitting steam
camera tilts back down to standard driving position

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward while briefly tilting the view upward to observe the massive industrial structure

entered.detail: enormous industrial building with multiple levels and steam vents emitting white smoke

segments.scene_description: While driving, the camera tilts upward to showcase a massive industrial building facade with steam vents, then returns to the forward driving position. The tanker cars remain visible on the right as the camera advances toward the imposing structure.

events.description: passing under a large yellow overhead traffic gantry
approaching a traffic light and intersection with other vehicles visible

agents.ego_description: driving under a series of industrial overpasses and yellow traffic gantries while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: white vehicle driving ahead in the same direction, gradually getting closer

entered.detail: large yellow industrial traffic gantry spanning the road with signage
tall traffic light pole with multiple signal heads
elevated metal walkway connecting industrial buildings on the left
overhead road sign structure with directional markings

segments.scene_description: The camera drives through a semi-covered industrial corridor with multiple overhead gantries and traffic structures. The tanker cars recede into the mid-distance on the right as the camera passes under yellow signage and approaches a traffic-controlled intersection.

events.description: slowing and initiating a right turn at the intersection
blue pickup truck enters from the left and turns right, which the camera follows

agents.ego_description: navigating the industrial intersection and turning right to follow a blue Thorton truck

notable_agents.action: blue Thorton pickup truck turning right from the cross street, leading the way
orange vehicle passing through the intersection from the right

entered.detail: traffic light assembly with green signal at the intersection
orange and white striped construction barriers at the corner
entrance to a covered industrial underpass or tunnel structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy industrial intersection, slows down, and executes a right turn following a blue Thorton truck. An orange vehicle passes through from the right as the camera navigates the turn, with the entrance to a covered underpass becoming visible ahead.

events.description: entering the covered underpass area with reduced lighting
slowing slightly to follow the blue truck into the covered structure

agents.ego_description: following the blue Thorton truck into the covered industrial underpass

notable_agents.action: blue Thorton truck driving ahead into the underpass, slowing down

entered.detail: large covered industrial passageway with roof structure blocking the sky
massive concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
line of parked vehicles along the left side of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the blue truck into a covered industrial underpass, transitioning from bright daylight to mixed lighting. Concrete support pillars line the left side where several cars are parked, while the road continues into the shadowed interior of the industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a sprawling industrial district that transitions from an open, hazy roadway into a shadowed subterranean underpass. It begins moving forward along a wide road lined with tanker cars and industrial chimneys, passing a dark sedan under a pale sky. As the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive building facade with venting steam, it then advances through a semi-covered corridor beneath heavy overhead gantries and yellow signage. The scene shifts as the camera slows at a busy intersection to execute a right turn, following a blue truck while an orange vehicle crosses its path. Finally, the camera trails the truck into a covered underpass, where the bright daylight gives way to mixed lighting and concrete support pillars lining the road.
